title: notify payload (Agent Atelier)
description: The INPUT payload for the `notify` MCP tool (PRD §16.2). `notify` is the only out-of-band human-reaching tool and is fully contracted: it is an act / external-irreversible capability (§14.1), governed and audited like publish. Idempotency is keyed by dedup_key over an open window (a re-send UPDATES, never duplicates). CRITICAL always breaks through quiet-hours/rate-caps (the dead-man's-switch channel, §14.5). Secrets note: recipient addresses / channel tokens resolve ONLY into the tool/MCP auth layer (§14.6) — they are NEVER passed in this payload or in body_markdown.

severity.description: §16.2 payload tiers. (The stored §17 Notification entity additionally carries an 'ambient' tier; the SEND payload uses these three.)

dedup_key.description: collapses poll re-detections; a re-send over the open window updates, never duplicates

body_markdown.description: plain-language owner voice (§12.4) — NEVER a raw span dump, NEVER a secret

piece_id.description: §17 join key, if the alert concerns one piece

run_id.description: §17, if the alert concerns one run

deep_link.description: link into the Review app / Studio Floor tray

recipients.description: logical recipient ids/roles; the actual addresses/tokens are resolved in the auth layer, not here (§14.6)
